sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: UBS Analyst Lowers Price Target for Charles Schwab (SCHW) to $11
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Charles Schwab (SCHW) to $119 from $125, while maintaining a "Buy" rating for the stock. This adjustment reflects current market conditions and follows similar price target revisions by other financial institutions. Despite the reduced target, the average analyst target price of $118.88 still implies an upside of 22.94% from its current price, and the stock maintains an "Outperform" status based on brokerage recommendations.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher Clarifies AssuredPartners Settlement And Acquisition Risk Exposure
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher has issued a clarification regarding a Department of Justice civil settlement related to an agency acquired from AssuredPartners. The company asserts that the settlement does not impact its acquisition of AssuredPartners, as the associated legal and financial exposure was anticipated and fully reserved prior to the deal. This disclosure aims to address investor concerns about acquisition-related risks and highlights Gallagher's due diligence process.

feed.title: Boeing Training Agreement Renewed for Three-Year Term
feed.summary: Delta Professional Services (DPS) has renewed its agreement with The Boeing Company to provide supplemental flight instruction and support training initiatives worldwide. The three-year contract, with an option for a two-year extension, involves DPS delivering instructor support aligned with competency-based training and assessment (CBTA) principles. A team of 43 professionals, including 37 instructors, will staff the Miami-based program.

feed.title: Bank of America Announces Redemption of $3,000,000,000 3.559% Fixed/Floating Rate Senior Notes, Due April 2027
feed.summary: Bank of America announced its plan to redeem all $3 billion of its 3.559% Fixed/Floating Rate Senior Notes, due April 2027, on April 23, 2026. The redemption will be at 100% of the principal amount, plus accrued and unpaid interest. Interest on these notes will cease to accrue from the redemption date.

feed.title: Wyndham wants one grandparent-grandchild duo to tackle Route 66 for $20K
feed.summary: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts is offering $20,000 to one grandparent-grandchild duo to drive Route 66, "The Mother Road," for its 100th anniversary. The chosen pair will document their week-long journey for social media, covering 2,400 miles and staying in Wyndham properties. Applicants must be US residents and at least 18, with the designated driver being 21 or older, and entries are due by May 1st.

feed.title: Woodward Inc. (WWD): Billionaire Stan Druckenmiller Trims Holding
feed.summary: Billionaire Stan Druckenmiller's Duquesne Capital has trimmed its holding in Woodward, Inc. (WWD) by 6% in Q4 2025, now owning 590,000 shares. The fund had significantly increased its stake in WWD in previous quarters, starting in Q4 2023. Despite the trim, hedge funds remain bullish on WWD due to its position in the recovering aerospace market and increased defense orders, though the article suggests that AI stocks may offer higher returns.

feed.title: Welltower will post Q1 results April 28, then host a call April 29
feed.summary: Welltower (NYSE: WELL) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 28, 2026. The company will then host a conference call and webcast on April 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Investors can access the earnings release in the Investor Relations section of Welltower's website, with webcast and telephone dial-in options for the conference call.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Named Official NFL Bank & Super Bowl MVP Sponsor - News and Statistics
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has signed a multiyear agreement to become the official bank and wealth-management sponsor of the National Football League, marking its largest sponsorship package to date. This partnership elevates U.S. Bancorp to the role of presenting sponsor for the Super Bowl Most Valuable Player award, beginning with Super Bowl LXI in February 2027. The bank, which already has long-standing relationships with several NFL and other professional sports teams, views this deal as a strategic move to gain unmatched access to a national audience.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand will report quarterly results after market close April 28
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE: IR) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after market close on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. Following the release, the company will host a live earnings conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Related presentation materials and a real-time webcast will be available on the Investor Relations website.

feed.title: XMax Advances AI Strategy Through Development and Deployment of An AI Inference Platform
feed.summary: XMax Inc. announced a key milestone in its AI strategy with the deployment of an AI inference platform. Its subsidiary, XMax AI Inc., partnered with CLOUD ALLIANCE INC to develop and deploy a cloud-based AI inference platform on Amazon Web Services designed to support scalable AI application development and commercialization. This initiative marks a foundational step in XMax's transition from a product-focused business to a software-centric AI platform company.

feed.title: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target for Royal Caribbean Group (RCL)
feed.summary: JP Morgan has lowered its price target for Royal Caribbean Group (RCL) to $341.00 from $376.00, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This adjustment reflects a 9.31% decrease in the estimated value. Despite this, the average target price from 24 analysts is $352.84, suggesting a potential upside of 26.42% from its current price of $279.11.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp updates financial statement presentation, provides retroactive supplemental schedules
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) updated its financial statement presentation effective January 1, 2026, providing unaudited retroactive supplemental historical information. These changes involved renaming and reclassifying various revenue captions and reallocating business units and fees to align with internal management reporting. The adjustments do not alter historical totals, previously reported net income, or key financial ratios.

feed.title: Waters Corp Stock Surges on FDA Clearance: What Investors Need to Know Now
feed.summary: Waters Corp (NYSE: WAT) shares have surged after receiving FDA clearance for its at-home cervical cancer screening kit, significantly improving access to HPV testing. This regulatory win positions Waters as a growing player in diagnostics, complementing its core analytical instrument business, and offers investors growth potential in the healthcare sector. The company's financial health, positive analyst ratings, and strategic expansion into diagnostics highlight its appeal for diversified portfolios, despite some short-term technical resistance.

feed.title: Datadog (DDOG) CTO exercises options and sells 32,300 Class A shares
feed.summary: Datadog, Inc. CTO Alexis Le-Quoc reported exercising options for 18,750 Class B shares, converting 32,300 Class B shares to Class A, and subsequently selling 32,300 Class A shares in open-market transactions. These sales, conducted on April 6, 2026, occurred at weighted-average prices between $115.13 and $117.90, under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. Following these transactions, Le-Quoc directly holds 531,311 Class A shares and indirectly controls a significant number of convertible Class B shares through a trust.

feed.title: [ARS] Kenvue Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. (KVUE) has filed an ARS form with the SEC on April 8, 2026, at 04:22 PM. This filing is available as a PDF document on the SEC EDGAR database. The article also provides a brief overview of Kenvue Inc., including its market capitalization, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Boeing delivers ViaSat-3 satellite for Asia-Pacific ahead of SpaceX launch (BA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Boeing has delivered the ViaSat-3 Flight 3 satellite to Viasat, a critical step toward expanding high-capacity communications to the Asia-Pacific region. This spacecraft, built at Boeing’s El Segundo facility, will enhance Viasat's coverage for commercial and government users. The ViaSat-3 constellation, which includes this satellite, uses Boeing's advanced 702MP+ platform and aims for global connectivity.

feed.title: Vornado (NYSE: VNO) highlights emissions cuts in 2025 sustainability report
feed.summary: Vornado Realty Trust's 2025 Sustainability Report details significant progress in environmental and ESG initiatives across its portfolios in New York, Chicago, and San Francisco. The report highlights a 42% reduction in landlord-controlled energy consumption from a 2009 baseline and a 58% reduction in Scope 1 and Scope 2 market-based emissions since 2019. Vornado achieved 100% LEED and WELL Health-Safety certifications, with several properties also earning ENERGY STAR NextGen status, demonstrating its commitment to carbon neutrality by 2030.

feed.title: How Merck slashed its bid for Terns Pharmaceuticals by $1B after reviewing cancer drug trial data
feed.summary: Merck reduced its acquisition offer for Terns Pharmaceuticals by $1 billion to $6.7 billion after reviewing cancer drug trial data. The initial per-share offer of $61 was lowered to $53. This adjustment came after further evaluation of the biotech company's drug pipeline.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group (WEC) director receives grant of phantom stock units
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group director Lane Thomas K was granted 296.4501 phantom stock units as deferred director fees, increasing his total holdings under the company's Director's Deferred Compensation Plan to 17,728.3859 units. These units are tied one-for-one to WEC common stock and were acquired in a transaction exempt from Section 16(b). This grant reflects a non-open market compensation award and was accrued under the company's deferred compensation plan.

feed.title: Bell Helicopter Sets New Sales Records in Latin America
feed.summary: Bell Textron Inc. announced at FIDAE 2026 that its Bell 505 helicopter set a new record for aircraft orders in Latin America in 2025, becoming the region's product of choice. This success highlights strong demand for versatile, high-performance helicopters and Bell's commitment to customer support, reinforcing its market position. The Bell 505, introduced in 2014 and certified in 2017, now has over 600 units operating globally.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Reports March Sales Results
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation reported net sales of $28.41 billion for March 2026, an 11.3% increase from the previous year. For the first 31 weeks, net sales rose 9.1% to $173.26 billion. Comparable sales increased by 9.4% for the 5-week period, with the calendar shift for Easter negatively impacting sales by approximately 1.5%.

feed.title: Tyson Foods Announces Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
feed.summary: Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE: TSN) will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026. Management will host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. Both live audio and a replay of the webcast will be available on the Tyson Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Net income $2,045M as U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) revises reporting
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp has revised its financial reporting presentation for its Consolidated Statement of Income and Balance Sheet, effective January 1, 2026. These changes involve reclassifying certain fee revenues and loan portfolios to better align with business management, but do not impact historical total net revenue, net income, key return metrics, total loans, or total assets. Under the new presentation, the company reported a net income attributable to U.S. Bancorp of $2,045 million and diluted earnings per common share of $1.26 for the quarter ended December 31, 2025.

feed.title: Baxter to Host First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call for Investors
feed.summary: Baxter International Inc. will host a conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. Investors can pre-register for the call or access the webcast through the company's website. Baxter, a global medtech company, specializes in medical devices and medications, with a mission to "Save and Sustain Lives."

feed.title: UDR will post quarterly results April 29, then host a public call
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after the market closes. Following the release, a webcast and conference call will be held on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time, where company officers will discuss results and recent events. The call will include a Q&A session limited to registered financial analysts.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy(FANG.US) Director Sells US$3.07 Million in Common Stock
feed.summary: A director at Diamondback Energy (FANG.US) recently sold 20,000 shares of common stock for a total value of $3.07 million. The transaction was executed at an average price of $153.53 per share, and following the sale, the director still directly owns 75,321 shares.

feed.title: MetLife to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after market close, with the details available on its Investor Relations webpage. A conference call for investors will be held on Thursday, May 7, 2026, from 9-10 a.m. ET, with a webcast replay accessible online for seven days. MetLife, a leading global financial services company, provides insurance, annuities, employee benefits, and asset management.

feed.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. (KREF) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 22, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call to discuss these results on April 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Details for accessing the call and supplemental materials are available on KREF's investor relations website.

feed.title: eBay (NASDAQ: EBAY) CEO’s 42,000-share sale executed via preset trading plan
feed.summary: eBay CEO Jamie Iannone sold 42,000 shares of eBay common stock on April 6-7, 2026, at prices ranging from the mid-$90s to high-$97s per share. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b-5 trading plan adopted on November 20, 2025. Following these transactions, Iannone directly holds 331,653 shares and indirectly holds an additional 218,057 shares through GRATs.

feed.title: A new CO2 heat pump aims to replace gas boilers in big buildings
feed.summary: Advansor, a part of Dover Food Retail, has launched the SteelXL Heat Pump, a high-capacity CO2 heat pump designed for industrial applications like food processing, district heating, and large commercial buildings. This new system offers a per-unit capacity of 5MW, scalable up to 50MW, and can achieve hot water output up to 203°F, making it a viable alternative to traditional gas or oil boilers. The SteelXL Heat Pump is also highly efficient, with a Coefficient of Performance (COP) up to 4.0, and can operate across a wide range of ambient temperatures using either air or water as a heat source.

feed.title: BSX INVESTOR DEADLINE: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a lead plaintiff deadline of May 4, 2026, for investors with substantial losses in Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) to join a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific made misleading statements and failed to disclose information regarding its revenue outlook, growth projections, and competitive market share, leading to a significant drop in stock price after the announcement of Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results. Investors who purchased Boston Scientific common stock between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, are encouraged to seek appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: SoCalGas (SOCGM) CEO Maryam Brown to exit; Schwecke to serve as interim president
feed.summary: Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) CEO Maryam Brown will resign from her position, including from the board, effective April 17, 2026. Rodger R. Schwecke has been appointed interim president, effective April 18, 2026, while retaining his role as COO until his planned retirement on October 1, 2026. Schwecke will receive a $150,000 cash lump sum for his interim role, contingent on his continued employment through September 30, 2026.

feed.title: PPL stock hits 52-week high at $39.09
feed.summary: PPL Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week high of $39.09, with a market cap of $29.4 billion and a 19.54% one-year total return. Despite being considered overvalued by InvestingPro, the company boasts 56 consecutive years of dividend payments, currently yielding 2.93%. Recent developments include regulatory decisions impacting subsidiary Rhode Island Energy's return on equity and a pending settlement for PPL Electric Utilities' distribution rate case.

feed.title: March Distributions for Crypto Option Income ETFs
feed.summary: Amplify’s crypto option income ETFs declared their March distributions, with annualized rates ranging from 27.90% to 50.52% across six funds. These ETFs utilize covered call strategies on digital asset exchange-traded products, rather than direct cryptocurrency holdings, to generate monthly income. The funds employ different strategies, with some aiming for maximum income by writing calls on their entire portfolios, and others targeting more moderate income levels by leaving a larger portion of their holdings for price appreciation.

feed.title: Kimco Realty will post Q1 results before the market opens April 30
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (NYSE: KIM) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will host a live conference call and webcast at 8:30 AM ET on the same day to discuss the results. As of December 31, 2025, Kimco owned interests in 565 U.S. shopping centers and mixed-use assets.

feed.title: Kimco Realty® Invites You to Join Its First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (NYSE: KIM) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026, before market open. The company invites investors to join its earnings conference call and webcast on the same day at 8:30 AM ET. Details for accessing the live webcast and dial-in numbers are provided for interested participants.

feed.title: Emerson Electric (NYSE: EMR) SVP withholds stock to cover tax obligations
feed.summary: Michael H. Train, SVP and Chief Sustainability Officer at Emerson Electric (NYSE: EMR), reported a routine tax-withholding transaction where 5,286 common shares were withheld to cover required minimum taxes upon the vesting of a stock grant. The shares were valued at $131.6138 each. Following this transaction, Train directly holds 245,711 common shares and maintains substantial indirect equity holdings through retirement plans.

feed.title: [ARS] STATE STREET CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by State Street Corp (STT), noting its low impact and neutral sentiment. The filing occurred on April 8, 2026, at 04:08 PM. The report also provides an overview of STT's stock data and recent news and filings.

feed.title: [ARS] EXXON MOBIL CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by Exxon Mobil Corp (XOM) on April 8, 2026. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. It provides details about the filing, including the company, form type, acceptance date, and links to the original document on SEC EDGAR.

feed.title: Moody’s Cuts Blue Owl Rating To Negative As Redemptions Spike - Blue Owl Capital (NYSE:OWL)
feed.summary: Moody's has downgraded Blue Owl Credit Income Corp's (OCIC) rating to negative from stable due to significantly higher-than-peer redemption requests in the first quarter, noting redemptions of 22% and 41% in its private credit and technology-focused funds, respectively. This follows a previous upgrade in January and comes amidst broader concerns in the private credit market, with other firms like Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan Chase, and BlackRock also capping redemptions. Despite the redemptions, Blue Owl managed to contain net outflows, though Moody's expects elevated redemptions to persist.

feed.title: KKR Sees A Lower $149 Target Yet The Story Isn’t Bearish
feed.summary: BofA analyst Craig Siegenthaler lowered KKR & Co. Inc.'s price target to $149 from $158 while maintaining a Buy rating due to macroeconomic indicators. Despite the reduced target, the buy rating reflects confidence in KKR's ability to navigate market challenges and sustain long-term growth. This confidence is bolstered by the final closing of KKR North America Fund XIV, a $23 billion private equity vehicle that highlights the firm's capacity to attract significant institutional capital.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (FANG) director sells 15,714 shares via 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) director Charles Alvin Meloy, through Wolfrock Energy, LLC, sold 15,714 shares of common stock on April 6 and April 7, 2026. These transactions were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on August 13, 2025, with sale prices ranging from $192.68 to $199.11 per share. Following the sales, Wolfrock Energy, LLC still holds 950,578 shares indirectly, and Meloy directly holds an additional 2,275 shares.

feed.title: Exxon plans spring and year-end overhauls at Beaumont, Texas refinery, sources say
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil plans two major overhauls at its Beaumont, Texas refinery in 2026. A 60,000-bpd coker will be shut down from May into June, followed by a 120,000-bpd gasoline-producing fluidic catalytic cracker and two hydrotreaters in December, lasting into January. The refinery is the third largest in the U.S. by crude oil processing capacity.

feed.title: POOL CORP (NASDAQ: POOL) director records 180,000-share stock gifts via trusts
feed.summary: POOL CORP director Manuel J. Perez de la Mesa reported gifting 180,000 shares of common stock through trusts on April 7, 2026. These bona fide gifts were made at $0.00 per share, indicating non-market transfers. Following these transactions, considerable holdings remain in various trusts and directly by the director and his family.

feed.title: Wix.com (NASDAQ:WIX) Stock Price Down 7.4% Following Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: Wix.com (NASDAQ:WIX) shares dropped 7.4% after Citizens Jmp downgraded the stock from "market outperform" to "market perform." Despite the downgrade and several price target reductions from other analysts, the consensus rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target significantly above the current share price. The company reported beating EPS estimates but slightly missing revenue expectations in its last quarterly earnings, and has authorized a $2.0 billion share buyback program.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) Sets New 1-Year Low on Analyst Downgrade
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) shares dropped to a new 52-week low after Goldman Sachs downgraded its price target, amidst a broader sector sell-off. Despite the stock being down about 30% in 2026, analysts still maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target of $187.46, and the company recently exceeded quarterly earnings estimates. Near-term challenges include ongoing analyst price target cuts, insider selling, and concerns over CEO compensation, though positive sentiment exists around AI adoption and strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Zurn Elkay to post Q1 results April 21, take investor questions next day
feed.summary: Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corporation (NYSE: ZWS) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The company will then host a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time, where Chairman and CEO Todd Adams and CFO Dave Pauli will discuss the results, provide a business update, and answer investor questions. Interested parties can access the call via a domestic toll-free number, an international toll number, or a live webcast on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: SLB (NYSE: SLB) investors back all director and pay proposals at 2026 AGM
feed.summary: SLB Limited shareholders approved all proposals at their 2026 Annual General Meeting, including the election of all nominated directors, advisory approval of executive compensation with 95.2% support, and the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor. They also endorsed the 2025 financial statements and dividends with 99.8% approval, and sanctioned amendments to the 2017 Omnibus Stock Incentive Plan with 97.6% support. These results signify strong shareholder confidence in the company's governance and compensation practices.

feed.title: Globe Life will post Q1 results April 22, then hold call next day
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on April 22, 2026. A conference call with a phone dial-in and online webcast will follow on April 23, 2026, at 11:00 AM ET. The company will post financial materials on its investor website under Financial Reports and Other Financial Information.

feed.title: Costco Is Starting a Standalone Gas Station Empire With a 40-Pump Discount Fuel Oasis
feed.summary: Costco is expanding its fuel operations by opening its first standalone 40-pump gas station in Mission Viejo, California, in June, followed by another in Hawai'i in 2027. These new stations will allow members to access discounted fuel without entering a Costco warehouse parking lot, though a membership will still be required. The move aims to capitalize on rising fuel prices, as Costco’s CFO noted that higher prices drive members to seek the incremental value offered by their discounted fuel.
